zh.Donington le Heath, Leicestershire, Engl: 英國英格蘭萊希斯特斯爾多寧頓 勒 希斯
zh.lifeSummary: 當Cecily Seis於大約1235年出生在英國英格蘭萊希斯特斯爾多寧頓 勒 希斯時，她的父親William Seis67歲，母親Mrs. William Seis63歲。她和Alexander de Villiers至少有2個兒子。

nameMeanings.name: Seis
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Scandinavian Arlis, Erik.
German: metonymic occupational name for a beekeeper, from Middle High German seim ‘honey’.
Norwegian: habitational name from any of ten or more farms so named, notably on the west coast of Norway, named with Old Norse Sæheimr, a compound of sær ‘sea’ + heimr ‘home, farmstead’.

variants.name: Sem
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Cambodian Chamroeun, Sophal, Kim Seng, Kosal, Lam, Phan, Phat, Soeum, Tan.  Indian Arup, Chander, Harish, Suman.
Indian (Punjab): Saraswat Brahmin name of unexplained etymology.
Norwegian: habitational name from any of about fifteen farms so named, a variant of   Seim  .

nameMeanings.name: Cecily
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Medieval vernacular English form of   Cecilia .

variants.name: Cecilie
meanings: Medieval vernacular English form of   Cecilia .

variants.name: Cicely
meanings: Variant of   Cecily .  This was a common form of the name in the Middle Ages, and in the 20th century was well known as the name of the British actress and singer  Cicely Courtneidge  (  1893–1980 ).

en.lifeSummary: When Cecily Seis was born about 1235, in Donington le Heath, Leicestershire, England, United Kingdom, her father, William Seis, was 67 and her mother, Mrs. William Seis, was 63. She had at least 2 sons with Alexander de Villiers.

ko.Donington le Heath, Leicestershire, Engl: 영국 잉글랜드 레이스스터실르 도닝턴 일 히스
